summary: Backend-only testing of PDF export with multiple drug readouts. All 18 tests PASSED. Verified: (1) PDF export creates separate DRUG READOUT sections for each enabled drug, (2) Mean BF calculation uses correct per-drug readout minute settings (input + perf_start + perf_delay), (3) Per-Minute BF table highlights drug readout rows with light purple (#e8d5f5) and bold text, (4) Per-Three Minutes HRV table highlights drug readout rows with light purple (#e8d5f5) and bold text.
critical_code_review_comments: export_utils.py lines 330-441: Multi-drug readout section correctly loops through all_drugs and creates separate DRUG READOUT header for each enabled drug
export_utils.py lines 378-392: BF and HRV readout minutes correctly calculated as: input + perf_start + perf_delay
export_utils.py lines 394-426: BF lookup searches per_minute_data first, falls back to hrv_windows if not found
export_utils.py lines 944-985: BF table drug_windows array collects windows from ALL enabled drugs
export_utils.py lines 1073-1114: HRV table drug_minutes array collects minutes from ALL enabled drugs
export_utils.py lines 1029-1031 and 1164-1166: Both tables apply TINTS['drug'] (#e8d5f5) background + bold text for highlighted rows
Code correctly handles first drug using global enable flags (enableHrvReadout/enableBfReadout) while subsequent drugs use per-drug enabled flag
seed_data_creation: Created mock test data with 2 drugs (Tetrodotoxin + Acetylcholine), 20 minutes of per_minute_data, 18 hrv_windows
context_for_next_testing_agent: PDF export multi-drug feature fully tested and working. Test file at /app/backend/tests/test_pdf_multi_drug_export.py can be reused for regression testing. Key test scenarios covered: multi-drug readouts, single drug disabled, all drugs disabled, out-of-range minutes, missing settings, drug name case matching.

features_verified.pdf_export_multi_drug_readouts: PASS - Separate DRUG READOUT sections created for each enabled drug in perDrug settings
features_verified.mean_bf_per_drug_settings: PASS - BF calculated at correct minute: bfReadoutMinute + perf_start + perf_delay
features_verified.hrv_per_drug_settings: PASS - HRV calculated at correct minute: hrvReadoutMinute + perf_start + perf_delay
features_verified.bf_table_highlighting: PASS - Drug readout rows highlighted with light purple (#e8d5f5) and bold text
features_verified.hrv_table_highlighting: PASS - Drug readout rows highlighted with light purple (#e8d5f5) and bold text
features_verified.edge_cases: PASS - Handles empty data, out-of-range minutes, missing settings, drug name case variations
